import React from "react"; import { Trash, Eye, Book } from "react-bootstrap-icons"; import { Card, Button, Container, Row, Col } from "react-bootstrap"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; function Decks({ decks }) { return decks.map((item, index) => { return ( {item.name}

{item.count} cards

 {item.description} ); }); } export default Decks;
